name: BcbsIdsAcaPgmPaymtExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT CMS_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_CK, ACTVTY_YRMO, PAYMT_COV_YRMO, PAYMT_TYP_CD, STATE_CODE, QHP_ID, CMS_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO, COV_START_DT, COV_END_DT, TRANS_AMT, ACA_PGM_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY, COALESCE(EXCH_RPT_DOC_CTL_NO, '0') as EXCH_RPT_DOC_CTL_NO, COALESCE(EXCH_RPT_NM, 'UNK') as EXCH_RPT_NM, EFT_TRACE_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSFINOwner}.CMS_ACA_PGM_PAYMT WHERE LAST_UPDT_DT > '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunDate}') SELECT CMS_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_CK, ACTVTY_YRMO, PAYMT_COV_YRMO, PAYMT_TYP_CD, STATE_CODE, QHP_ID, CMS_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO, COV_START_DT, COV_END_DT, TRANS_AMT, ACA_PGM_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY, EXCH_RPT_DOC_CTL_NO, EXCH_RPT_NM, EFT_TRACE_ID FROM cte
